description: Composition Black round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar, and bold graphic and flock print on chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print Bear that modest smile while you flaunt to the world your perfect side in style with this Mr. Perfect t-shirt from mr. men. Claim your personification of perfection all day in comfort in this cotton tee, and stay fresh and dry with no worries. Team it with jeans and casual lifestyle footwear for that cool casual look.
